name: release-it
description: release-it — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Release Tooling.

seo.title: release-it Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete release-it analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: release-it is a Release / App Store Operations tool.
pros: Automates app store submissions and release management
cons: Tight coupling to app store review process timelines
review.best_for: Mobile teams shipping frequent app updates
review.not_for: Web-only products without native app distribution
